scripts.gen-api: dotnet build ../src/Swr.Net/Swr.Net.csproj -c Release /p:CopyLocalLockFileAssemblies=true && dotnet tool run xmldocmd ../src/Swr.Net/bin/Release/net8.0/Swr.Net.dll src/content/docs/reference --source https://github.com/kidchenko/swr-dotnet/tree/main/src/Swr.Net --visibility public --clean && node scripts/add-frontmatter.mjs
